knowledge_base.answer:
👋 **Welcome to Unasemeje Support!**
I am your AI helper. I can help you with:

• 🚀 **How to buy services**
• 💰 **Adding money and checking your balance**
• 📦 **Checking your orders**
• 🎁 **Earning money by inviting friends**
• 🛠️ **Fixing problems**

Please type your question below!

🛒 **We have many services for Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube!**

Here are some of our best services right now:

🚀 **How to buy:**
1️⃣ Go to **New Order**.
2️⃣ Choose the **App** (like Instagram or TikTok).
3️⃣ Choose the **Service** you want (like followers or likes).
4️⃣ Paste your **Profile or Post Link**.
5️⃣ Enter the **Number** you want and click **CONFIRM**!

💡 *Note: Make sure your account is PUBLIC before buying followers or views!*

💰 **How to add money:**
1️⃣ Go to the **Add Funds** page.
2️⃣ Make sure your **M-Pesa phone number** is saved in your profile!
3️⃣ Enter the amount you want to add.
4️⃣ Pay using M-Pesa.

⚡ *Your money will be added to your account automatically!*

💰 **Your current balance is KES {balance}.**

If you need more money, go to the **Add Funds** page to add more! 🚀

📦 **You have {active_orders} order(s) working right now!**

Most orders start in 0 to 5 minutes. You can check them on the **My Orders** page. If an order fails, the money is automatically returned to your wallet!

🚨 **Did you send money but it is not in your wallet?**
1️⃣ Did you send it from a **phone number saved in your profile**?
2️⃣ It can take up to 5 minutes to show up.
3️⃣ If it has been a long time, click 'Human Support' below and send us the **M-Pesa message** so we can add it for you! 🛠️

🔒 **How to change your password:**
Go to the **Add Funds** page and scroll down to **'Change Your Password'**. Type your old password and your new password, then click save. Keep your account safe! 🛡️

📱 **How to add or change your M-Pesa number:**
Go to the **Add Funds** page and scroll to **'Update Your Details'**. You can add up to 2 extra phone numbers. 

⚠️ *IMPORTANT: You MUST click 'Save Changes' BEFORE you add money, or the system will not see your payment!*

💵 **How our prices work:**
All prices are for **1,000 items**. 

For example, if a service costs **KES 50 per 1,000**, and you buy **2,000 followers**, it will cost you **KES 100**!

💡 *Check the 'Services' page to see the exact price for each app!*

🎁 **Earn Money by Inviting Friends!**
Share your special referral code with your friends. Every time they buy something, **YOU get 10% of the money** added to your wallet!

💸 *It is an easy way to earn! Check your code on the **Referrals** page.*

💬 **How to buy custom comments:**
1️⃣ Choose a 'Custom Comments' service in **New Order**.
2️⃣ A text box will appear.
3️⃣ Type your comments (**put each comment on a new line**).
4️⃣ The system will count them and show you the price!

🔥 *You choose exactly what the comments will say!*

⏳ **Is your order stuck on 'Pending'?**
Please do not worry! Sometimes it takes a little time to start. 

1️⃣ Wait 15 to 30 minutes.
2️⃣ If it still has not started, go to **My Orders** and click 'Sync Status'.
3️⃣ If the order fails, the money is **automatically returned** to your wallet! ✅

🔗 **Important Link Rules:**
• **For Followers/Profile Views:** Paste your PROFILE link (example: instagram.com/username).
• **For Likes/Views/Comments:** Paste the link to the specific POST.
• ⚠️ **Your profile MUST be PUBLIC!** If your account is private, you cannot get followers or views, and the order will fail.

❌ **Can I cancel an order?**
Once you buy an order, it starts immediately and **cannot be cancelled**.

But, if the order fails or does not finish, the system will **automatically give the money back** to your wallet! 💸

🛡️ **Is it safe? Will my account get banned?**
Yes, it is 100% safe! We use safe methods that look natural. 

• We never ask for your password (Never share your password!).
• It is safe for all accounts.
• If you lose followers, many of our services will **replace them for free within 30 days**! 🔄

🚨 **It looks like you sent money from a phone number that is not saved in your account.**

To help you, please reply with the **exact phone number** you used to send the money (example: 0712345678).

*I will check our system to see if we can find your payment!*

🎉 **Good news! I found your payment from that phone number and have added the money to your wallet!**

*Next time, please remember to save your phone number in your profile so the money is added automatically.*

knowledge_base.topic: Unregistered Payment Not Found in System
knowledge_base.answer:
❌ **Sorry, we cannot find any payment from that phone number in our system.**

Because the number is not saved in your account, our system cannot find it automatically. 

📞 **We cannot find your payment. Please contact WhatsApp support** and send them your M-Pesa message so they can help you add the money manually!

knowledge_base.topic: Update Profile, Name, Username or Phone Number
knowledge_base.answer:
✅ **I can help you change your profile or save a new phone number!**

Please tell me what you want to change:
• **New Phone Number:** (example: 'Change my number to 0712345678')
• **New Name:** (example: 'Change my name to John Doe')
• **New Username:** (example: 'Change my username to johndoe')

*Just reply with the new details, and I will save them to your account!*

💰 **Looking for cheap services? Here are our cheapest options (All below KES 100 for 1,000 items)!**

🔹 **Facebook Followers:** KES 45 for 1,000
🔹 **Facebook Page Likes:** KES 60 for 1,000
🔹 **Instagram Likes:** KES 30 for 1,000
🔹 **TikTok Followers:** KES 85 for 1,000
🔹 **YouTube Views:** KES 90 for 1,000

🚀 *These are our lowest prices! Go to **New Order** and choose these services to save money!*

knowledge_base.topic: Casual Greetings, Thanks, and Silly Questions
knowledge_base.answer:
😊 **Hello!**

I am your AI helper for Unasemeje! 

If you need help with **adding money, buying services, or checking your balance**, please ask me. Have a wonderful day! 🌟
